name: Accredited Solutions, Inc.
business: Accredited Solutions, Inc. sells Diamond Creek High Alkaline Water, a 9.5pH high alkaline natural spring water, sourced from award winning springs. The company focuses on expanding US distribution reach to service national chain stores and increasing warehouse direct-to-retail channel. It also seeks strategic acquisitions and partnerships in the beverage sector.

exposures.sentence: Diamond Creek High Alkaline Water is a 9.5pH high alkaline natural spring water, sourced from the highest quality, award winning springs.

tamClaims.claim: Total bottled water sales reached $18.1B from 2019-2020 seeing a 5.7% year over year growth. The global bottled water market size is expected to reach USD 505.19 billion by 2028, according to a new report by Grand View Research, Inc. It is expected to expand at a CAGR of 11.1% from 2021 to 2028.
